omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Purchase information. When you make a purchase on the Likee Services, you may provide us with information about your orders, payment information, billing, and shipping address.
Purchase information. When you make a purchase on the Likee Services, you may provide us with information about your orders, payment information, billing, and shipping address.

Location Information. We may collect information about your location (e.g., country) based on your IP addresses. We may also collect and use your precise location with your permission and when you use certain location-related features.
